testcase.name: test_get_contracts
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_backend_refactoring_phase2.py:246: in test_get_contracts assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get contracts failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get contracts failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_invoices
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_backend_refactoring_phase2.py:259: in test_get_invoices assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get invoices failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get invoices failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
